info.name: Calendar Backend API
info.description: Complete API collection for Calendar Backend with role-based authorization (OWNER, ADMIN, MEMBER)

request.description: Refresh JWT token for Google OAuth sessions
Get all organizations for current user
Send invitation to join organization (OWNER, ADMIN)
Get meetings without pagination (max 1000 for calendar view)
Create custom slot for specific date
Get custom slots for date range
Get blocked times for date range
Link Google Calendar event to Meeting
Generate presigned URL for image upload
Generate presigned URL for file upload
Generate presigned URL for PDF upload
Generate presigned URL for report upload
Get Google Calendar events by date
Get consultant profile and available slots (Public)
Trigger AI processing for a meeting
